description: Sample resume dataset for AI Resume Screening System. Each record contains candidate name, a plain-text resume body, a pre-extracted skills list, years of experience, and highest education.

records.name: Ali Hassan
records.text:
Ali Hassan — Python Developer
Experience: 3 years
Skills: Python, Machine Learning, TensorFlow, SQL, Django, REST APIs
Education: BS Computer Science, FAST NUCES Lahore, 2020
Projects: Built an image classification pipeline using TensorFlow; developed REST API backends with Django for two startups.

records.name: Sara Khan
records.text:
Sara Khan — Data Scientist
Experience: 2 years
Skills: Python, NLP, Deep Learning, scikit-learn, pandas, numpy
Education: MS Data Science, NUST Islamabad, 2022
Projects: Sentiment analysis on social media data; text summarisation using transformer models; customer churn prediction with XGBoost.

records.name: Ahmed Raza
records.text:
Ahmed Raza — Backend Engineer
Experience: 4 years
Skills: Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, Docker, Kubernetes
Education: BS Software Engineering, UET Lahore, 2019
Projects: Designed microservices architecture for a fintech platform; containerised 12 services with Docker and orchestrated via Kubernetes.

records.name: Fatima Malik
records.text:
Fatima Malik — AI Researcher
Experience: 5 years
Skills: Python, PyTorch, Computer Vision, OpenCV, Research
Education: PhD Computer Science (in progress), Quaid-i-Azam University
Publications: 3 peer-reviewed papers on object detection and medical imaging. Proficient in training custom YOLO variants and building research pipelines.

records.name: Usman Tariq
records.text:
Usman Tariq — Junior Web Developer
Experience: 1 year (internship)
Skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React
Education: BS Computer Science (in progress), COMSATS University
Projects: Built portfolio websites and a React-based task management app.

records.name: Zara Baig
records.text:
Zara Baig — ML Engineer
Experience: 3 years at an AI startup
Skills: Python, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras, SQL, Flask
Education: MS Computer Science, Lahore University of Management Sciences, 2021
Projects: End-to-end ML pipelines for demand forecasting and anomaly detection; deployed models as REST APIs using Flask.
